# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

Prevent insecure file upload vulnerabilities.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: User File Upload Manager
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents securely.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Membership Site Developer
 * Text Domain: user-file-upload
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class User_File_Upload_Manager {

    private $upload_dir;
    private $upload_url;
    private $allowed_mime_types;
    private $max_file_size;

    public function __construct() {
        $wp_upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $this->upload_dir = $wp_upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files/';
        $this->upload_url = $wp_upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/user-files/';
        $this->max_file_size = 10 * 1024 * 1024; // 10MB

        $this->allowed_mime_types = array(
            'jpg'  => 'image/jpeg',
            'jpeg' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png'  => 'image/png',
            'gif'  => 'image/gif',
            'webp' => 'image/webp',
            'pdf'  => 'application/pdf',
            'doc'  => 'application/msword',
            'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'odt'  => 'application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text',
            'txt'  => 'text/plain',
        );

        add_action('init', array($this, 'create_upload_directory'));
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', array($this, 'render_upload_form'));
        add_action('admin_post_user_file_upload', array($this, 'handle_file_upload'));
        add_shortcode('user_uploaded_files', array($this, 'render_user_files'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_styles'));
        add_action('admin_post_delete_user_file', array($this, 'handle_file_deletion'));
    }

    public function create_upload_directory() {
        if (!file_exists($this->upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($this->upload_dir);
        }

        $htaccess_file = $this->upload_dir . '.htaccess';
        if (!file_exists($htaccess_file)) {
            $htaccess_content = "Options -Indexes\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "Options -ExecCGI\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "RemoveHandler .php .php3 .php4 .php5 .php7 .php8 .phtml .pht .phps .cgi .pl .py .sh .bash\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "AddHandler text/plain .php .php3 .php4 .php5 .php7 .php8 .phtml .pht .phps .cgi .pl .py .sh .bash\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<FilesMatch \"\\.(php|php3|php4|php5|php7|php8|phtml|pht|phps|cgi|pl|py|sh|bash|exe|bat|cmd|com|vbs|js|wsh|wsf|shtml)$\">\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Order Allow,Deny\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Deny from all\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</FilesMatch>\n";
            file_put_contents($htaccess_file, $htaccess_content);
        }

        $index_file = $this->upload_dir . 'index.php';
        if (!file_exists($index_file)) {
            file_put_contents($index_file, '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }
    }

    public function enqueue_styles() {
        wp_enqueue_style(
            'user-file-upload-styles',
            false
        );
        wp_add_inline_style('user-file-upload-styles', $this->get_inline_css());
    }

    private function get_inline_css() {
        return '
            .ufu-upload-form {
                max-width: 600px;
                margin: 20px 0;
                padding: 25px;
                background: #f9f9f9;
                border: 1px solid #ddd;
                border-radius: 8px;
            }
            .ufu-upload-form label {
                display: block;
                margin-bottom: 5px;
                font-weight: 600;
            }
            .ufu-upload-form input[type="file"],
            .ufu-upload-form select,
            .ufu-upload-form input[type="text"] {
                width: 100%;
                padding: 8px;
                margin-bottom: 15px;
                border: 1px solid #ccc;
                border-radius: 4px;
                box-sizing: border-box;
            }
            .ufu-upload-form input[type="submit"] {
                background: #0073aa;
                color: #fff;
                padding: 10px 25px;
                border: none;
                border-radius: 4px;
                cursor: pointer;
                font-size: 14px;
            }
            .ufu-upload-form input[type="submit"]:hover {
                background: #005a87;
            }
            .ufu-notice {
                padding: 12px 15px;
                margin: 10px 0;
                border-radius: 4px;
                font-weight: 500;
            }
            .ufu-notice-success {
                background: #d4edda;
                color: #155724;
                border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
            }
            .ufu-notice-error {
                background: #f8d7da;
                color: #721c24;
                border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
            }
            .ufu-files-list {
                margin: 20px 0;
            }
            .ufu-file-item {
                display: flex;
                align-items: center;
                justify-content: space-between;
                padding: 12px 15px;
                margin-bottom: 8px;
                background: #fff;
                border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
                border-radius: 6px;
            }
            .ufu-file-info {
                flex: 1;
            }
            .ufu-file-name {
                font-weight: 600;
                margin-bottom: 3px;
            }
            .ufu-file-meta {
                font-size: 12px;
                color: #666;
            }
            .ufu-file-actions a {
                display: inline-block;
                padding: 5px 12px;
                margin-left: 5px;
                font-size: 12px;
                text-decoration: none;
                border-radius: 3px;
            }
            .ufu-btn-view {
                background: #0073aa;
                color: #fff !important;
            }
            .ufu-btn-delete {
                background: #dc3545;
                color: #fff !important;
            }
            .ufu-file-thumbnail {
                width: 50px;
                height: 50px;
                object-fit: cover;
                border-radius: 4px;
                margin-right: 15px;
            }
            .ufu-allowed-types {
                font-size: 12px;
                color: #666;
                margin-bottom: 15px;
            }
        ';
    }

    public function render_upload_form($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="ufu-notice ufu-notice-error">' . esc_html__('You must be logged in to upload files.', 'user-file-upload') . '</div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'type' => 'all', // all, profile_picture, document
        ), $atts, 'user_file_upload');

        $output = '';

        if (isset($_GET['ufu_status'])) {
            $status = sanitize_text_field($_GET['ufu_status']);
            $message = isset($_GET['ufu_message']) ? sanitize_text_field(urldecode($_GET['ufu_message'])) : '';

            if ($status === 'success') {
                $output .= '<div class="ufu-notice ufu-notice-success">' . esc_html($message) . '</div>';
            } elseif ($status === 'error') {
                $output .= '<div class="ufu-notice ufu-notice-error">' . esc_html($message) . '</div>';
            }
        }

        $allowed_extensions = array_keys($this->allowed_mime_types);
        $accept_attr = implode(',', array_map(function($ext) { return '.' . $ext; }, $allowed_extensions));

        $output .= '<div class="ufu-upload-form">';
        $output .= '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data" action="' . esc_url(admin_url('admin-post.php')) . '">';
        $output .= wp_nonce_field('user_file_upload_nonce', 'ufu_nonce', true, false);
        $output .= '<input type="hidden" name="action" value="user_file_upload">';
        $output .= '<input type="hidden" name="redirect_url" value="' . esc_url(get_permalink()) . '">';

        $output .= '<label for="ufu_file_type">' . esc_html__('File Category', 'user-file-upload') . '</label>';
        $output .= '<select name="ufu_file_type" id="ufu_file_type">';
        if ($atts['type'] === 'all' || $atts['type'] === 'profile_picture') {
            $output .= '<option value="profile_picture">' . esc_html__('Profile Picture', 'user-file-upload') . '</option>';
        }
        if ($atts['type'] === 'all' || $atts['type'] === 'document') {
            $output .= '<option value="document">' . esc_html__('Document', 'user-file-upload') . '</option>';
        }
        $output .= '</select>';

        $output .= '<label for="ufu_description">' . esc_html__('Description (optional)', 'user-file-upload') . '</label>';
        $output .= '<input type="text" name="ufu_description" id="ufu_description" maxlength="255" placeholder="' . esc_attr__('Brief description of the file', 'user-file-upload') . '">';

        $output .= '<label for="ufu_file">' . esc_html__('Select File', 'user-file-upload') . '</label>';
        $output .= '<input type="file" name="ufu_file" id="ufu_file" accept="' . esc_attr($accept_attr) . '" required>';

        $output .= '<div class="ufu-allowed-types">';
        $output .= esc_html__('Allowed types: ', 'user-file-upload') . esc_html(strtoupper(implode(', ', $allowed_extensions)));
        $output .= ' | ' . esc_html__('Max size: ', 'user-file-upload') . esc_html(size_format($this->max_file_size));
        $output .= '</div>';

        $output .= '<input type="submit" value="' . esc_attr__('Upload File', 'user-file-upload') . '">';
        $output .= '</form>';
        $output .= '</div>';

        return $output;
    }

    public function handle_file_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die(__('Unauthorized access.', 'user-file-upload'), 403);
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field($_POST['ufu_nonce']), 'user_file_upload_nonce')) {
            wp_die(__('Security check failed.', 'user-file-upload'), 403);
        }

        $redirect_url = isset($_POST['redirect_url']) ? esc_url_raw($_POST['redirect_url']) : home_url();

        if (!isset($_FILES['ufu_file']) || $_FILES['ufu_file']['error'] === UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('No file was selected.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        $file = $_FILES['ufu_file'];

        // Check for upload errors
        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $error_message = $this->get_upload_error_message($file['error']);
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', $error_message);
            return;
        }

        // Validate file size
        if ($file['size'] > $this->max_file_size) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('File size exceeds the maximum allowed size.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        if ($file['size'] === 0) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('Uploaded file is empty.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Validate that the file was actually uploaded via HTTP POST
        if (!is_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('Invalid upload detected.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Get and sanitize the original filename
        $original_filename = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);

        // Extract extension from the original filename
        $file_extension = strtolower(pathinfo($original_filename, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));

        // Validate extension is in our allowed list
        if (!array_key_exists($file_extension, $this->allowed_mime_types)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('File type not allowed.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Verify MIME type using WordPress's wp_check_filetype_and_ext
        $validated = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $original_filename, $this->allowed_mime_types);

        if (!$validated['ext'] || !$validated['type']) {
            // Fallback: check MIME type with finfo
            $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
            $detected_mime = $finfo->file($file['tmp_name']);

            if (!in_array($detected_mime, $this->allowed_mime_types, true)) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('File content does not match the allowed file types.', 'user-file-upload'));
                return;
            }

            // Verify the detected MIME matches the expected MIME for the extension
            $expected_mime = $this->allowed_mime_types[$file_extension];
            if ($detected_mime !== $expected_mime) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('File extension does not match file content.', 'user-file-upload'));
                return;
            }
        }

        // Additional check: verify image files are actually valid images
        if (strpos($this->allowed_mime_types[$file_extension], 'image/') === 0) {
            $image_info = @getimagesize($file['tmp_name']);
            if ($image_info === false) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('The uploaded image file is not a valid image.', 'user-file-upload'));
                return;
            }

            // Strip EXIF data and re-save to remove potential embedded code
            $image_info_mime = $image_info['mime'];
            if (!in_array($image_info_mime, $this->allowed_mime_types, true)) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('Invalid image type detected.', 'user-file-upload'));
                return;
            }
        }

        // Check for dangerous content patterns in non-image files
        if (strpos($this->allowed_mime_types[$file_extension], 'image/') !== 0) {
            $file_content = file_get_contents($file['tmp_name']);
            $dangerous_patterns = array(
                '<?php',
                '<?=',
                '<script',
                '<%',
                '#!/',
                '<% @',
            );
            $file_content_lower = strtolower($file_content);
            foreach ($dangerous_patterns as $pattern) {
                if (strpos($file_content_lower, strtolower($pattern)) !== false) {
                    $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('File contains potentially dangerous content.', 'user-file-upload'));
                    return;
                }
            }
        }

        // Block double extensions like file.php.jpg
        $name_without_ext = pathinfo($original_filename, PATHINFO_FILENAME);
        $dangerous_extensions = array('php', 'php3', 'php4', 'php5', 'php7', 'php8', 'phtml', 'pht', 'phps', 'cgi', 'pl', 'py', 'sh', 'bash', 'exe', 'bat', 'cmd', 'com', 'vbs', 'js', 'wsh', 'wsf', 'shtml', 'svg', 'swf', 'html', 'htm', 'asp', 'aspx', 'jsp');
        $name_parts = explode('.', $name_without_ext);
        foreach ($name_parts as $part) {
            if (in_array(strtolower($part), $dangerous_extensions, true)) {
                $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('Filename contains a disallowed extension.', 'user-file-upload'));
                return;
            }
        }

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $file_type = isset($_POST['ufu_file_type']) ? sanitize_text_field($_POST['ufu_file_type']) : 'document';
        $description = isset($_POST['ufu_description']) ? sanitize_text_field($_POST['ufu_description']) : '';

        if (!in_array($file_type, array('profile_picture', 'document'), true)) {
            $file_type = 'document';
        }

        // Create user-specific subdirectory
        $user_dir = $this->upload_dir . $current_user_id . '/';
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
            // Add index.php to user directory
            file_put_contents($user_dir . 'index.php', '<?php // Silence is golden.');
        }

        // Generate a unique, safe filename
        $safe_filename = wp_unique_filename($user_dir, $this->generate_safe_filename($file_extension));
        $destination = $user_dir . $safe_filename;

        // Move the uploaded file
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('Failed to save the uploaded file.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        // Set restrictive file permissions
        chmod($destination, 0644);

        // If it's an image, sanitize it by re-processing
        if (strpos($this->allowed_mime_types[$file_extension], 'image/') === 0) {
            $sanitized = $this->sanitize_image($destination, $file_extension);
            if (!$sanitized) {
                @unlink($destination);
                $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('Failed to process the uploaded image.', 'user-file-upload'));
                return;
            }
        }

        // Store file metadata in the database
        $file_data = array(
            'user_id'       => $current_user_id,
            'file_name'     => $safe_filename,
            'original_name' => $original_filename,
            'file_type'     => $file_type,
            'mime_type'     => $this->allowed_mime_types[$file_extension],
            'file_size'     => filesize($destination),
            'description'   => $description,
            'upload_date'   => current_time('mysql'),
            'file_path'     => $current_user_id . '/' . $safe_filename,
        );

        $existing_files = get_user_meta($current_user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($existing_files)) {
            $existing_files = array();
        }

        // If uploading a profile picture, remove the old one
        if ($file_type === 'profile_picture') {
            foreach ($existing_files as $key => $existing_file) {
                if ($existing_file['file_type'] === 'profile_picture') {
                    $old_file_path = $this->upload_dir . $existing_file['file_path'];
                    if (file_exists($old_file_path)) {
                        @unlink($old_file_path);
                    }
                    unset($existing_files[$key]);
                }
            }
            $existing_files = array_values($existing_files);
        }

        // Rate limiting: max 20 documents per user
        $document_count = 0;
        foreach ($existing_files as $ef) {
            if ($ef['file_type'] === 'document') {
                $document_count++;
            }
        }
        if ($file_type === 'document' && $document_count >= 20) {
            @unlink($destination);
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('You have reached the maximum number of uploaded documents (20).', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        $file_data['id'] = wp_generate_uuid4();
        $existing_files[] = $file_data;
        update_user_meta($current_user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', $existing_files);

        // Update profile picture URL in user meta
        if ($file_type === 'profile_picture') {
            $profile_pic_url = $this->upload_url . $current_user_id . '/' . $safe_filename;
            update_user_meta($current_user_id, 'ufu_profile_picture', $profile_pic_url);
        }

        $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'success', __('File uploaded successfully!', 'user-file-upload'));
    }

    private function sanitize_image($file_path, $extension) {
        if (!function_exists('wp_get_image_editor')) {
            require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-includes/class-wp-image-editor.php';
        }

        $editor = wp_get_image_editor($file_path);
        if (is_wp_error($editor)) {
            return false;
        }

        $result = $editor->save($file_path);
        if (is_wp_error($result)) {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    private function generate_safe_filename($extension) {
        $unique_id = bin2hex(random_bytes(16));
        $timestamp = time();
        return $timestamp . '_' . $unique_id . '.' . $extension;
    }

    private function get_upload_error_message($error_code) {
        $messages = array(
            UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE   => __('The uploaded file exceeds the server maximum upload size.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE  => __('The uploaded file exceeds the maximum allowed size.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL    => __('The file was only partially uploaded.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE    => __('No file was uploaded.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR => __('Server configuration error: missing temporary folder.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE => __('Failed to write file to disk.', 'user-file-upload'),
            UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION  => __('A server extension stopped the file upload.', 'user-file-upload'),
        );

        return isset($messages[$error_code]) ? $messages[$error_code] : __('Unknown upload error.', 'user-file-upload');
    }

    private function redirect_with_message($url, $status, $message) {
        $redirect_url = add_query_arg(array(
            'ufu_status'  => $status,
            'ufu_message' => urlencode($message),
        ), $url);

        wp_safe_redirect($redirect_url);
        exit;
    }

    public function render_user_files($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="ufu-notice ufu-notice-error">' . esc_html__('You must be logged in to view your files.', 'user-file-upload') . '</div>';
        }

        $atts = shortcode_atts(array(
            'type' => 'all',
        ), $atts, 'user_uploaded_files');

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = get_user_meta($current_user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', true);

        if (!is_array($files) || empty($files)) {
            return '<div class="ufu-notice">' . esc_html__('You have not uploaded any files yet.', 'user-file-upload') . '</div>';
        }

        // Filter by type if specified
        if ($atts['type'] !== 'all') {
            $files = array_filter($files, function($file) use ($atts) {
                return $file['file_type'] === $atts['type'];
            });
        }

        if (empty($files)) {
            return '<div class="ufu-notice">' . esc_html__('No files found for this category.', 'user-file-upload') . '</div>';
        }

        $output = '<div class="ufu-files-list">';

        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $file_url = $this->upload_url . $file['file_path'];
            $is_image = strpos($file['mime_type'], 'image/') === 0;

            $output .= '<div class="ufu-file-item">';

            if ($is_image) {
                $output .= '<img src="' . esc_url($file_url) . '" alt="' . esc_attr($file['original_name']) . '" class="ufu-file-thumbnail">';
            }

            $output .= '<div class="ufu-file-info">';
            $output .= '<div class="ufu-file-name">' . esc_html($file['original_name']) . '</div>';
            $output .= '<div class="ufu-file-meta">';
            $output .= esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file['file_type'])));
            $output .= ' | ' . esc_html(size_format($file['file_size']));
            $output .= ' | ' . esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), strtotime($file['upload_date'])));
            if (!empty($file['description'])) {
                $output .= ' | ' . esc_html($file['description']);
            }
            $output .= '</div>';
            $output .= '</div>';

            $output .= '<div class="ufu-file-actions">';
            $output .= '<a href="' . esc_url($file_url) . '" target="_blank" class="ufu-btn-view">' . esc_html__('View', 'user-file-upload') . '</a>';

            $delete_url = add_query_arg(array(
                'action'   => 'delete_user_file',
                'file_id'  => $file['id'],
                '_wpnonce' => wp_create_nonce('delete_user_file_' . $file['id']),
                'redirect_url' => urlencode(get_permalink()),
            ), admin_url('admin-post.php'));

            $output .= '<a href="' . esc_url($delete_url) . '" class="ufu-btn-delete" onclick="return confirm(\'' . esc_js(__('Are you sure you want to delete this file?', 'user-file-upload')) . '\');">' . esc_html__('Delete', 'user-file-upload') . '</a>';
            $output .= '</div>';

            $output .= '</div>';
        }

        $output .= '</div>';

        return $output;
    }

    public function handle_file_deletion() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die(__('Unauthorized access.', 'user-file-upload'), 403);
        }

        $file_id = isset($_GET['file_id']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['file_id']) : '';
        $redirect_url = isset($_GET['redirect_url']) ? esc_url_raw(urldecode($_GET['redirect_url'])) : home_url();

        if (empty($file_id)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('Invalid file ID.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_GET['_wpnonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field($_GET['_wpnonce']), 'delete_user_file_' . $file_id)) {
            wp_die(__('Security check failed.', 'user-file-upload'), 403);
        }

        $current_user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = get_user_meta($current_user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', true);

        if (!is_array($files)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('No files found.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        $file_found = false;
        foreach ($files as $key => $file) {
            if ($file['id'] === $file_id) {
                // Ensure the file belongs to the current user
                if ((int)$file['user_id'] !== $current_user_id) {
                    wp_die(__('Unauthorized access.', 'user-file-upload'), 403);
                }

                $file_path = $this->upload_dir . $file['file_path'];

                // Validate the file path is within the expected directory
                $real_upload_dir = realpath($this->upload_dir);
                $real_file_path = realpath(dirname($file_path));

                if ($real_file_path !== false && strpos($real_file_path, $real_upload_dir) === 0) {
                    if (file_exists($file_path)) {
                        @unlink($file_path);
                    }
                }

                if ($file['file_type'] === 'profile_picture') {
                    delete_user_meta($current_user_id, 'ufu_profile_picture');
                }

                unset($files[$key]);
                $file_found = true;
                break;
            }
        }

        if (!$file_found) {
            $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'error', __('File not found.', 'user-file-upload'));
            return;
        }

        $files = array_values($files);
        update_user_meta($current_user_id, 'ufu_uploaded_files', $files);

        $this->redirect_with_message($redirect_url, 'success', __('File deleted successfully.', 'user-file-upload'));
    }

    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            __('User Files', 'user-file-upload'),
            __('User Files', 'user-file-upload'),
            'manage_options',
            'user-file-upload',
            array($this, 'render_admin_page'),
            'dashicons-media-document',
            30
        );
    }

    public function render_admin_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_die(__('Unauthorized access.', 'user-file-upload'));
        }

        $users = get_users(array('fields' => array('ID', 'display_name', 'user_email')));

        echo '<div class="wrap">';
        echo '<h1>' . esc_html__('User Uploaded Files', 'user-file-upload') . '</h1>';

        echo '<h2>' . esc_html__('Shortcodes', 'user-file-upload') . '</h2>';
        echo '<p><code>[user_file_upload]</code> - ' . esc_html__('Display the upload form', 'user-file-upload') . '</p>';
        echo '<p><code>[user_file_upload type="profile_picture"]</code> - ' . esc_html__('Upload form for profile pictures only', 'user-file-upload') . '</p>';
        echo '<p><code>[user_file_upload type="document"]</code> - ' . esc_html__('Upload form for documents only', 'user-file-upload') . '</p>';
        echo '<p><code>[user_uploaded_files]</code> - ' . esc_html__('Display user\'s uploaded files', 'user-file-upload') . '</p>';
        echo '<p><code>[user_uploaded_files type="profile_picture"]</code> - ' . esc_html__('Display only profile pictures', 'user-file-upload') . '</p>';

        echo '<hr>';
        echo '<h2>' . esc_html__('All User Files', 'user-file-upload') . '</h2>';

        echo '<table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">';
        echo '<thead><tr>';
        echo '<th>' . esc_html__('User', 'user-file-upload') . '</th>';
        echo '<th>' . esc_html__('File Name', 'user-file-upload') . '</th>';
        echo '<th>' . esc_html__('Type', 'user-file-upload') . '</th>';
        echo '<th>' . esc_html__('Size', 'user-file-upload') . '</th>';
        echo '<th>' . esc_html__('Description', 'user-file-upload') . '</th>';
        echo '<th>' . esc_html__('Upload Date', 'user-file-upload') . '</th>';
        echo '<th>' . esc_html__('Actions', 'user-file-upload') . '</th>';
        echo '</tr></thead>';
        echo '<tbody>';

        $has_files = false;

        foreach ($users as $user) {
            $files = get_user_meta($user->ID, 'ufu_uploaded_files', true);
            if (!is_array($files) || empty($files)) {
                continue;
            }

            foreach ($files as $file) {
                $has_files = true;
                $file_url = $this->upload_url . $file['file_path'];

                echo '<tr>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->display_name) . '<br><small>' . esc_html($user->user_email) . '</small></td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($file['original_name']) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html(ucfirst(str_replace('_', ' ', $file['file_type']))) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html(size_format($file['file_size'])) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html($file['description']) . '</td>';
                echo '<td>' . esc_html(date_i18n(get_option('date_format') . ' ' . get_option('time_format'), strtotime($file['upload_date']))) . '</td>';
                echo '<td><a href="' . esc_url($file_url) . '" target="_blank" class="button button-small">' . esc_html__('View', 'user-file-upload') . '</a></td>';
                echo '</tr>';
            }
        }

        if (!$has_files) {
            echo '<tr><td colspan="7">' . esc_html__('No files have been uploaded yet.', 'user-file-upload') . '</td></tr>';
        }

        echo '</tbody></table>';
        echo '</div>';
    }

    /**
     * Get a user's profile picture URL.
     *
     * @param int $user_id
     * @return string|false
     */
    public static function get_profile_picture_url($user_id) {
        $url = get_user_meta($user_id, 'ufu_profile_picture', true);
        return !empty($url) ? $url : false;
    }
}

// Initialize the plugin
new User_File_Upload_Manager();

/**
 * Template tag to get user profile picture.
 *
 * @param int $user_id
 * @param array $args Optional. Arguments for the image tag.
 * @return string HTML img tag or empty string.
 */
function ufu_get_user_profile_picture($user_id, $args = array()) {
    $url = User_File_Upload_Manager::get_profile_picture_url($user_id);
    if (!$url) {
        return '';
    }

    $defaults = array(
        'width'  => 96,
        'height' => 96,
        'class'  => 'ufu-profile-picture',
        'alt'    => '',
    );

    $args = wp_parse_args($args, $defaults);

    if (empty($args['alt'])) {
        $user = get_userdata($user_id);
        $args['alt'] = $user ? $user->display_name : '';
    }

    return sprintf(
        '<img src="%s" width="%d" height="%d" class="%s" alt="%s">',
        esc_url($url),
        intval($args['width']),
        intval($args['height']),
        esc_attr($args['class']),
        esc_attr($args['alt'])
    );
}
